description_long: This rifle features a compact, modern bullpup design with a matte black and dark gray finish. The main body is constructed from polymer and metal, with a prominent detachable box magazine located behind the pistol grip. The rifle is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail on top for mounting optics, and it has integrated flip-up iron sights. The barrel is relatively short, ending with a simple muzzle device. The stock is fixed and seamlessly integrated into the rear of the weapon, contributing to its streamlined, tactical appearance.
description: A compact, modern bullpup rifle with a matte black and gray finish, featuring a fixed stock, detachable box magazine, and integrated iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile, front sight, and the compact width of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bullpup configuration, fixed stock, detachable magazine, and full-length Picatinny rail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock, magazine, and the alignment of the sights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same bullpup layout, magazine, and rail, with more detail on the ejection port area.
